name: STANDARD MOTOR PRODUCTS, INC.
summary: Standard Motor Products, Inc. (SMP) is a leading manufacturer and distributor of premium replacement parts for the automotive aftermarket and a custom-engineered solutions provider to vehicle and equipment manufacturers. Operating through four segments—Vehicle Control, Temperature Control, Nissens Automotive, and Engineered Solutions—SMP offers ignition components, fuel delivery parts, air conditioning systems, thermal management products, sensors, switches, and electrification electronics. Products are sold to retailers, warehouse distributors, OEMs, and OE service part operations in the U.S., Europe, Canada, Mexico, and other countries.

products.name: Engine Management Components
products.description: Ignition coils, fuel injectors, EGR components, air management valves for internal combustion engine vehicles.

products.name: Electrical & Safety Components
products.description: ABS sensors, TPMS sensors, ADAS sensors, electrical switches, actuators, and connectors for powertrain-neutral vehicle systems.

products.name: Wire Sets & Other
products.description: Spark plug wire sets, coil on plug boots and accessories for vehicle ignition systems.

products.name: AC System Components
products.description: Compressors, air conditioning repair kits, connecting lines, heat exchangers, and expansion devices.

products.name: Other Thermal Components
products.description: Parts for engine, transmission, electric drive motor, and battery temperature management.

products.name: Engine Cooling Products
products.description: Radiators, oil coolers, electric water pumps, temperature sensors, expansion tanks, and fan clutches.

products.name: Air Conditioning Products (Nissens)
products.description: Compressors, condensers, blowers, fans, pressure sensors, evaporators, expansion valves, and heaters.

products.name: Engine Efficiency Products
products.description: Turbochargers, intercoolers, EGR valves, EGR modules, EGR coolers, and oil feed pipes.

products.name: Thermal Management Products (Engineered Solutions)
products.description: Hose assemblies, accumulators, driers, compressors, heat exchangers, and motors for HVAC, battery, and heat exchange systems.

products.name: Sensors (Engineered Solutions)
products.description: Speed, position, temperature, pressure, level, and particulate matter sensors for diverse vehicle and equipment markets.

products.name: Switches (Engineered Solutions)
products.description: Electrical performance, position, temperature, pressure, tilt, and fluid level switches.

products.name: Power Distribution Products
products.description: Power switching, industrial solenoids, and voltage regulators.

products.name: Electrification & Electronics
products.description: CAN devices, CAN bus wiring and splitting devices, electronic controls, transmitters, and components.

products.name: Injection & Fuel Delivery
products.description: Components for gasoline, diesel, CNG, LNG, LPG, and hydrogen fuel applications in transportation.

products.name: Ignition & Emissions (Engineered Solutions)
products.description: Wire, ignition coils, and positive crankcase ventilation valves.

products.name: Clamping Devices
products.description: Clamping solutions for commercial, light vehicle automotive, and industrial applications.
